title: sphenandra caerulea
intro: Sphenandra caerulea, also known as blue sphenandra, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The plant's health benefits include its potential to help with urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and urinary infections, as well as its ability to aid in the reduction of blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Sphenandra caerulea typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or added to topical creams for skin conditions.
